_comment: Single source of truth for the FreeDocStore add-on catalog. Read by the FreeDocStore extension (system prompt + Options UI). Add-ons are toggled ONLY by the chat agent - never edit features.json by hand. See .github/VISION.md.

addOns.name: Search
addOns.description: Client-side full-text search via Pagefind. Adds a search box to the topbar and a keyboard shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl+K).
addOns.generates: Pagefind index + search UI on every page

addOns.name: Topbar nav
addOns.description: Renders the site topbar from a single docs/nav.json file. One source of truth for menu items, with auto-validation that every page is either in the nav or in navSkip.
addOns.generates: Injected nav block in every docs/*.html page at deploy time

addOns.name: Changelog
addOns.description: Auto-generates a changelog page from git commit history. Categorises changes by file type. Skips commits with [skip ci] (or any of the GitHub skip-CI directives).

addOns.name: Sitemap
addOns.description: Auto-generates a sitemap page indexing every page on the site, with summaries pulled from the head of each file.
askPrompts: show me what pages are on this site

addOns.name: Page metadata
addOns.description: Adds a small footer to every page with the last-updated date (from git) and an Edit on GitHub link.
addOns.generates: Footer block injected into every docs/*.html page
askPrompts: show last-updated dates on each page

addOns.name: References
addOns.description: Renders docs/references/index.html from a manifest.json catalog of downloadable source files (PDFs, decks, attachments) with title, description, tags, and upload date.

addOns.name: Table of contents
addOns.description: Auto-generates a per-page 'On this page' panel from h2/h3 headings inside <main>. Inserts smooth-scroll anchor links and ensures every targeted heading has an id. Skips pages with fewer than 2 headings or with the <!-- @no-toc --> marker.
addOns.generates: Inline <aside class="auto-toc"> block injected into every qualifying docs/*.html page at deploy time
askPrompts: enable table of contents on each page

addOns.name: Code blocks
addOns.description: Adds a hover-revealed Copy button to every <pre> block in <main>, plus Prism syntax highlighting for <pre><code class="language-foo"> blocks. Bundled languages: html, css, javascript, typescript, bash, json, yaml, python, go, rust. Self-hosted assets (no CDN, no CSP changes). Per-page opt-out via <!-- @no-codeblocks -->.
addOns.generates: Inline style+script block injected into <head> of pages with <pre> in <main>; Prism JS+CSS copied into docs/codeblocks/
askPrompts: enable syntax highlighting and copy buttons on code blocks

addOns.name: Callouts
addOns.description:
Styled blocks for Note, Tip, Warning, Danger via class shortcuts. Author writes
...
and gets a coloured left-border box with an icon. Pure CSS, no JS, no images. Variants: note (blue), info (alias for note), tip (green), warn (amber), danger (red). Optional title row via .
addOns.generates: Inline <style> block injected into <head> of pages that use any .callout class
askPrompts: enable callouts (note, tip, warn, danger blocks)

addOns.name: Prev/Next nav
addOns.description: Adds a Previous / Next link pair at the end of every page that appears in nav.json, using the order of nav entries as the sequential reading flow. First page has no Prev, last has no Next. Pages outside nav (404, sitemap, changelog) are skipped. Per-page opt-out via <!-- @no-prev-next -->.
addOns.generates: Inline <style> + <nav class="prev-next"> block injected just before </main> on every page in nav.json

addOns.name: Branding
addOns.description: Sitewide brand customisation. Reads features.json.branding (logo, logoAlt, accent, lineColor, text, bg, textMuted) and injects CSS variables into <head> + rewrites the topbar logo src/alt across every page. CSS vars cascade-override the playbook's default styles.css values, so any subset of keys can be set. Use to skin the playbook for a client or a specific project.
addOns.generates: Inline
askPrompts: use logo.svg as the brand logo
